---
title: "gam_table"
format: html
---

## Choosing a GAM Framework


::: {.course-info tbl-colwidths="[70, 30]"}
| condition | R package::function |
|------------|--------------------------------|
| Default starting point | `mgcv::gam()` |
| Large dataset | `mgcv::bam()` |
| Need full Bayesian posterior inference | `brms` |
| Need AR(1) residual correlation not handled by smooths | `mgcv::gamm()` |
| Need complex distributional modeling (beyond mean structure) | `gamlss` or `brms` |
| Heavy crossed random effects with simpler smooths | `gamm4` |

:::
